name: templates/feature-rows
description: Stacked full-width rows template for 3-5 one-liner points.

usage: Paste snippet HTML inside .ls-deck and copy its registryDependencies before use.
Keep 3-5 rows with one sentence each; the single-column .ls-grid centers the block vertically.

composition.itemCountGuidance: 3-5 one-liner points; for 4-6 very short items use templates/icon-grid.
composition.copyGuidance: One keyword or short title plus one sentence per row.

alternatives.when: 3 items with 2-4 sentences or visuals each

useCases: List 3-5 short principles, steps, or takeaways as full-width rows.
